requirements.description: Dispatcher discovers available actions, describes them, and validates arguments.
Dispatcher dry-run mode prints descriptions and warns on unknown arguments without executing actions.
Actions correctly resolve and pass RelativePath arguments without warnings.
Every action script exists at the expected path.
Dispatcher fails when RelativePath is missing or invalid.

Workflow checks out the LabVIEW icon editor repository and tests the composite action defined in apply-vipc/action.yml with minimum_supported_lv_version '2021', vip_lv_version '2021', supported_bitness '64', relative_path 'C:\actions-runner\_work\labview-icon-editor\labview-icon-editor', and vipc_path 'C:\actions-runner\_work\labview-icon-editor\labview-icon-editor\.github\actions\apply-vipc\runner_dependencies.vipc' on a self-hosted Windows runner labeled icon-editor-windows with dry_run true.

Workflow checks out the LabVIEW icon editor repository and tests the composite action defined in apply-vipc/action.yml with minimum_supported_lv_version '2021', vip_lv_version '2021', supported_bitness '64', relative_path 'C:\actions-runner\_work\labview-icon-editor\labview-icon-editor', and vipc_path 'C:\actions-runner\_work\labview-icon-editor\labview-icon-editor\.github\actions\apply-vipc\runner_dependencies.vipc' on a self-hosted Windows runner labeled icon-editor-windows with dry_run false.
